sourceMovie.title: Jawan
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Jawan for the same reason it broke through in 2023: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Atlee keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: V for Vendetta
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Jawan clicked for you, V for Vendetta (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Jawan clicked for you, Furious 7 (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Jawan?
faq.answer: Try V for Vendetta, Furious 7, American Assassin—each shares DNA with Jawan while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Jawan?
faq.answer: Jawan (2023) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Jawan worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
